title: bidens cernua
intro: Bidens cernua, also known as nodding beggar-ticks or nodding bur-marigold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bidens cernua include its ability to reduce fever, relieve congestion, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Bidens cernua include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
